title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies:
Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
